cover_letter:
I can write this, but I’m missing your resume and the full job description details. Please paste:
1) Your resume text (or key sections: summary, skills/tech stack, 2-3 recent roles with impact bullets, notable projects).
2) The full Uniplaces job description (responsibilities + requirements + stack if listed).
3) The links you want included (GitHub, LinkedIn, portfolio) and your preferred name/sign-off.
Once you send those, I’ll return a 150–220 word cover letter plus a 4–6 sentence email draft tailored to Uniplaces and the Full Stack Developer role.
email_subject: Application: Full Stack Developer at Uniplaces
email_body: Share your resume + the complete job description and I’ll draft this properly. Also send the links you want included (GitHub/LinkedIn/portfolio) and your preferred sign-off name. Right now I only have the title/location but not the role specifics or your background to match it to. Once you paste them, I’ll return the final email with resume mentioned as attached and your links included.
